extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each entity: I counted only the Against rows—criminal proceedings of 1 against the Company, 1 against Directors and 1 against Promoters (3 total), statutory/regulatory actions of 1 against the Company, and tax proceedings of nil against the Company and nil against the Subsidiary (0); the Company’s 5 tax proceedings and ₹69.55 million amount in the By our Company row were excluded. The aggregate quantified amount against the Company and Subsidiary is explicitly Nil, so total litigation against the group is ₹0.0 crore, rather than including the ₹69.55 million filed by the Company. Contingent liabilities use the stated Total of ₹69.55 million as of March 31, 2023, converted at ₹10 million per crore to ₹6.955 crore; the source tables use ₹ million. The section gives no company-wide top-five or top-ten customer concentration percentage for any fiscal period or denominator, and it does not mention going-concern uncertainty or a statutory auditor report status.
